⚠ $STRONK⚠ We Go Jim⚠ Every Chart Is A PR Attempt⚠ The Dip Is Just The Eccentric Phase⚠ Do Not Skip Bag Day⚠ Stonks Walked So Stronk Could Deadlift⚠ Light Weight Baby ⚠ $STRONK⚠ We Go Jim⚠ Every Chart Is A PR Attempt⚠ The Dip Is Just The Eccentric Phase⚠ Do Not Skip Bag Day⚠ Stonks Walked So Stronk Could Deadlift⚠ Light Weight Baby

Overheard at the squat rack, 6:04 AM:
"bro what's a whitepaper"

Stronk found DeFi the same way he finds everything: somebody at the gym said it made numbers go up. He didn't read the docs. Stronk doesn't read docs. Stronk reads plates.

He opened a chart, saw a green candle, and recognized it instantly: that's a PR attempt. Red candle? That's just the eccentric phase. You're supposed to control it on the way down. Sideways for three weeks? That's a deload. It's programmed. Stop crying.

There is no utility. Utility is cardio for tokens, and Stronk doesn't do cardio. There's just the bag, the bulk, and the unshakeable belief that if you never sell, you never miss a rep. The ticker is misspelled on purpose. STONKS walked so STRONK could deadlift.

Complete 01

Warm-Up Set

Empty the bar. Deploy the contract. Launch on the Robinhood Chain. Never skip the warm-up. That's how contracts get injured.

02

Add Plates

Community reps. Meme volume. First PR on the chart. Everybody in the group chat spots each other.

03

The Bulk

CEX? Never heard of her. We eat listings for breakfast. Bag gets bigger, shorts stay the same size.

04

One Rep Max

Valhalla. Stronk doesn't set price targets, he sets PRs. The only ceiling is the one he headbutts on the way up.

  • Side effects may include buying every dip, calling every candle a PR attempt, and referring to your wallet as "the bag" in professional settings.
  • Do not operate a leverage account while under the influence of $STRONK.
  • May cause unsolicited form checks on strangers' portfolios.
  • If a green candle lasts longer than 4 hours, that's just the pump. Enjoy it.
  • Keep out of reach of paper hands.
